title: Forecast Committee: Fusing a Panel of Base Forecasters
strategies: equal-weight committee mean: average the k member forecasts with no learning (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference, ~0.1)
skill-weighted average: score each member by its validation Brier and weight the average toward the members that beat a coin, down-weighting near-noise members
calibrated logit-space stacking: ridge-regress validation outcomes on member log-odds to jointly re-weight and recalibrate, shrinking toward the skill-weighted prior on thin validation histories

trim + rank-fusion + isotonic calibration: drop clearly weak members, fuse by rank or by member-specific calibration maps, and blend fusers -- different amounts of headroom on different panels, none reaching the test-fitted oracle
